torch_pattern:
x = torch.relu(x)
x = torch.exp(x)
x = torch.square(x)
applicability_notes: Fuses a contiguous subsequence of N elementwise unary torch ops into a single ttnn.unary_chain kernel launch; activation-only, no weights. fast_and_approximate_mode flag passed as UnaryWithParam param (e.g. EXP, False).; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.unary_chain(x_tt, [ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.RELU), ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.EXP, False), ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.SQUARE)])

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [N, C, H, W] tile-aligned (padded_shape == [N, C, H, W])
placement_observations.source: unit_test: xt.to(ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT).to(device) — default interleaved DRAM, no explicit memory_config
unit_test: output inherits default interleaved memory config; verified via ttnn.to_torch round-trip
